programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Matthew and James for a recap of Day 3, and let’s just say they’ll be staying away from crunches for the foreseeable future. From there, James goes into his background and the challenges he’s overcome to be able to rise up and test his limits.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Day 4 of Season 3 kicks off with some much anticipated shooting.. or does it? This course of fire is actually using the latest cutting-edge CO2 technologies to train the contestants with another option for nonlethal force. Having a new weaponry option tucked in their arsenal, the competitors set out on their first recon mission for their CIA mission. Trudging through Alligator infested waters to their rendezvous point, the weight of the successful mission hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Contestants Stephen and Zacharias sit down to go through their experience with shooting the latest nonlethal weaponry and how their mission prep is going so far. From there, host Chris Heavens invites U.S. Arms and Athlon Optics to take a seat and show a sneak peak at their latest products. Before the end of the episode, the contestants let it slip that there’s going to be quite the surprise to come.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For physical training, Don does something unexpected when he hands over the reins to a contestant to lead. One would think that would make for an easy go of it, if it weren’t for the 3-time Olympian that was now in charge. Next, co-host Mike Glover leads Surviving Mann’s first ever After-Action report to debrief the previous night’s mission. Afterwards, the infamous Blah line makes its season debut to the contestants’ chagrin.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Jenn and Lanny to take a deep dive into last night’s mission. If it wasn’t difficult enough to do a full day of Surviving Mann training, an overnight mission with no breaks seems to be the cherry on top. After a refreshing 2 hours of sleep, the contestants were back at it with an Olympic-level PT session hosted by Lanny. From there, Jen fills us in on a secret new product in the next episode of Surviving Mann that reminds her of... Fembots? Stay tuned.

programme.title: Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Full 60-Minute 4K Nature Film ✨ Journey into one of the most magical landscapes on Earth — Plitvice Lakes National Park, Croatia’s crown jewel of cascading waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and lush alpine forests. This full-length 60-minute cinematic nature film invites you to relax and explore the mesmerizing beauty of Europe’s oldest and most breathtaking national park, filmed in stunning 4K Ultra HD. Follow the flow of crystal-clear water as it connects 16 terraced lakes through a labyrinth of waterfalls, travertine pools, and forest pathways — a symphony of nature captured in its purest form. 🎬 Presented by NatureStream.tv, creators of Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 1: Slovenia, this film is part of our global nature series designed to inspire calm, mindfulness, and appreciation for Earth’s beauty.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve “Cuz” Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle. The winner will receive $486,600 and their name forever engraved on the coveted Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Tune in to the crowning of a WPT Champion in this epic conclusion of the WPT Choctaw Main Event.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Table of the first ever WPT Ladies Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is set. Kathy Liebert, Jamie Kerstetter, Olga Iermolcheva, Lina Niu, Cindy Spier, and Dusti Smith round out our final six. Find out who has what it takes to become the first WPT Ladies Champion and take home the first place prize of $105,136.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Six talented poker competitors remain in the first ever WPT Ladies Championship. Lina Niu has the chip lead, but Olga Iermolcheva is right on her heels. Tension is rising as the short stacks are being forced to make their move to stay alive. It’s anyone’s game as final table action gets back underway at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: One of poker’s top female earners of all time, Kathy Leibert finds herself as the shortest stack at the table with only four women remaining. Watch Kathy reach into her bag of tricks as she attempts to battle back in hopes of becoming the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down. Prepare for plenty of thrilling poker action under the lights at Wynn Las Vegas as we play down to the crowning of the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: Panning For Gold - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Our players try and sift for those last few nuggets as the night winds down on our visit to The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In Canada! - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We team up with our friends at partypoker to make our first trip to Canada! Playground Poker Club in Montreal is host to our high-stakes cash game, played by luminaries from the US, Canada, and the UK. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: A Playground For Poker - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The pros at partypoker sling chips at nose-bleed stakes with their friends at Playground Poker Club in Montreal. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Mauvais Coup - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: There are some wicked turn outs for the partypoker pros as the poker at Playground Poker Club in Montreal winds down on the first day of our visit. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: partypoker Poker Party - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We begin our second day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, and the pros from partypoker face off against some of the best players in North America. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Matt almost lands at the bottom of the bay while trying to catch a gang of shanghaiing sailors.

programme.title: Straight Shooter 1939
programme.desc: An undercover federal agent investigates the mysterious death of an elderly man suspected of involvement in a major bank robbery. Posing as a drifter to infiltrate the local community, he must outsmart a ruthless gang also hunting for the missing loot while protecting the victim's niece

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E2 Billy the Kid
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark arrives in New Mexico to investigate the legendary outlaw Billy the Kid. Clark must navigate the violent chaos of the Lincoln County War to track down the young gunman, ultimately working to dismantle the Kid’s network and bring the notorious fugitive to justice.

programme.title: Riffleman S1 Episode 11 - The Apprentice Sheriff
programme.desc: When a young, inexperienced man is appointed acting sheriff, Lucas McCain must step in to mentor him, guiding the novice lawman through a tense confrontation with a group of reckless outlaws who are testing his mettle.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 4: The Mill
programme.desc: A bitter feud erupts between the Cartwrights and a neighboring family after a disagreement over water rights and the operation of a local mill. As tensions rise and accusations of sabotage mount, the families must find a way to resolve their conflict before the dispute escalates into irreparable violence

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1E6 - Eight Hours To Die
programme.desc: Lucas McCain faces a desperate race against time when a vengeful man kidnaps his son, Mark, holding him hostage in a remote location. The captor gives Lucas exactly eight hours to complete a series of humiliating tasks, forcing Lucas to decide how far he is willing to go to save his son’s life before the deadline expires

programme.title: Utah 1945
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Utah, a lively mix of song, romance, and Western action! When a city socialite inherits a sprawling ranch, she plans to sell it off—until Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers step in to show her the true value of life on the range. With scheming villains, sweeping landscapes, and plenty of toe-tapping tunes, this Roy Rogers classic proves that the West is as rich in heart as it is in land.

programme.title: Bells Of Rosarita
programme.desc: Sue Farnum inherits a circus, but her dead father's partner is trying to take it away from her. Roy and Bob Nolan are filming a movie on location at the circus. They and a number of other western movie stars come to Sue's aid, putting on a show and catching the bad guys.

programme.title: Lights of Old Santa Fe
programme.desc: Rival rodeos are operated by good guy Gabby and bad guy Richard Powers. Dale is trying to choose between them, aided ultimately by Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers (who are radio singers).
